text.title: Requirements Validation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a pre-baseline checkpoint or compliance gate?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Block baselining; return to requirements authors with issue list.

example.trace: pre-baseline=yes → blocking=false → sign-off; 22 requirements approved by Amaia 2026-05-22.
